problem_text_cn: 1448 用拉脱法测量水的表面张力系数。[可供仪器和用具] 液体表面张力系数测量仪（复旦天欣公司生产），砝码，水，玻璃皿，拉环，温度计，清洁纸。[要求] 用液体表面张力测定仪采用拉脱法测量室温下的液体表面张力系数。
problem_text_en: 1448 Measure the surface tension coefficient of water using the pull-off method. [Available instruments and tools] Liquid surface tension coefficient measuring instrument (produced by Fudan Tianxin Company), weights, water, glass dish, pull ring, thermometer, clean paper. [Requirements] Use the liquid surface tension measuring instrument to measure the surface tension coefficient of liquid at room temperature using the pull-off method.
img_cn: 图1448_1：拉脱法测表面张力实验装置及数据处理
img_en: Fig. 1448_1: Experimental device and data processing for measuring surface tension by pull-off method
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】金属环拉脱液膜时，表面张力 $f = \alpha \cdot \pi(D_1 + D_2)$，临脱离时 $F = mg + f$，液膜拉断后 $F' = mg$，故 $\Delta U = kf$，得 $\alpha = \frac{\Delta U}{k\pi(D_1 + D_2)}$。先由砝码定标得灵敏度 $k = 3007\ \mathrm{mV/N}$，再测 $\Delta U$，代入 $\bar{D_1} = 3.316\ \mathrm{cm}$，$\bar{D_2} = 3.491\ \mathrm{cm}$，$\theta = 5.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，得 $\bar{\alpha} = 75.10 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{N/m}$，与公认值 $74.9 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{N/m}$ 百分差为 $0.27\%$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】When the metal ring pulls off the liquid film, surface tension $f = \alpha \cdot \pi(D_1 + D_2)$. At the moment before detachment, $F = mg + f$; after the film breaks, $F' = mg$, so $\Delta U = kf$, leading to $\alpha = \frac{\Delta U}{k\pi(D_1 + D_2)}$. First calibrate the sensitivity $k = 3007\ \mathrm{mV/N}$ with weights, then measure $\Delta U$, substitute $\bar{D_1} = 3.316\ \mathrm{cm}$, $\bar{D_2} = 3.491\ \mathrm{cm}$, $\theta = 5.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, get $\bar{\alpha} = 75.10 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{N/m}$, with a percentage difference of $0.27\%$ from the accepted value $74.9 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{N/m}$.
problem_answer: 水的表面张力系数：$\boldsymbol{75.10 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{N/m}}$（$5.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$）；与公认值百分差：$\boldsymbol{0.27\%}$；测量关键：传感器定标求灵敏度 $k$，拉脱瞬间测 $\Delta U$。
